postData.contentHtml:
1. I know that I know nothing.
  2. Success is on the far side of failure.
  3. Only those who will risk going too far can possibly find out how far one can go.
  4. If two people have the same opinion, one is unnecessary.
  5. The Golden Rule: Whoever Has the Gold Makes the Rules
  6. There is only one good, knowledge, and one evil, ignorance.
  7. We are wrong because we don't know what we don't know and so think that we know.
  8. Strong minds discuss ideas, average minds discuss events, weak minds discuss people.
  9. Respond, don't react.
  10. You have to get it wrong to get it right
postData.title: The ever growing collection of quotes that inspire me
postData.description: The ever growing collection of quotes that inspire Maurice Kühl
